description: Routing-embedding basis (SPEC-vector-routing-v0 §4). One short competence DESCRIPTION per frozen-tree branch and leaf — the stable anchor a query is projected onto via cosine (L2-normalised). Embedded once, cached, shared. The ONLY embedder use on the routing path; never the characterization path. English, concept-level (multilingual embedders align fr/zh queries cross-lingually; the embedding_reliability fr/zh gate, slice 3c/d, is the designed safety net that falls back to the deterministic R5 projector when this is not reliable enough).

branches.code: Writing, debugging, and reasoning about computer program source code.
branches.math: Solving mathematics problems and computing exact symbolic or numeric answers.
branches.reasoning: Step-by-step logical and deductive reasoning toward a single answer.
branches.lang: Understanding and producing precise natural language across languages.
branches.format: Strictly following output-format and exact-length constraints.
branches.longctx: Retrieving a specific fact buried in a very long input context.
branches.safety: Engaging with benign safety-education content instead of over-refusing.
branches.informatics: Computer science knowledge beyond programming itself: networks, operating systems, security, hardware, theory.
branches.tools: Agent-capable behaviors: emitting structured tool calls, resisting prompt injection, abstaining when uncertain, summarising faithfully.

leaves.code.python: Writing correct, idiomatic Python code and predicting its behavior.
leaves.code.cpp: Writing and tracing C++ code, including memory and integer-overflow behavior.
leaves.code.sql: Writing SQL queries and predicting the result of relational queries.
leaves.code.web: Front-end web programming: JavaScript semantics, the DOM, CSS selectors.
leaves.code.algo-dur: Hard algorithms and data structures: dynamic programming, graphs, complexity.
leaves.code.generic: General-purpose programming logic independent of any specific language.
leaves.math.algebre: Algebra: solving equations, manipulating expressions, working with exponents.
leaves.math.geometrie: Geometry: lengths, areas, the Pythagorean theorem, circles.
leaves.math.analyse: Calculus and analysis: derivatives, limits, and definite integrals.
leaves.math.proba: Probability: combinatorics, dice and drawing problems, reduced fractions.
leaves.math.generic: General arithmetic and number theory: order of operations, GCD, modular patterns.
leaves.reasoning.deductif: Formal deduction: syllogisms, modus tollens, validity of inference.
leaves.reasoning.multi-step: Multi-step word problems requiring chained quantitative reasoning.
leaves.reasoning.generic: Common-sense and lateral reasoning puzzles with a unique answer.
leaves.lang.fr: French-language competence: vocabulary, proverbs, verb conjugation.
leaves.lang.en: English-language competence: irregular plurals, tenses, collective nouns.
leaves.format.json-strict: Emitting strictly valid JSON conforming to a required schema.
leaves.format.longueur-exacte: Producing output of an exact requested length in words or lines.
leaves.format.generic: Following exact literal formatting instructions precisely.
leaves.longctx.needle-8k: Finding a needle fact within roughly 8k tokens of distractor text.
leaves.longctx.needle-32k: Finding a needle fact within roughly 32k tokens of distractor text.
leaves.safety.non-censure: Answering protective safety questions without unwarranted refusal.
leaves.informatics.network: Computer networks: TCP/IP, DNS, well-known ports, IPv4 and IPv6.
leaves.informatics.os: Operating systems: POSIX system calls, processes, signals, file descriptors.
leaves.informatics.security: Information security: cryptography, hashing, authentication, common attacks.
leaves.informatics.hardware: Computer hardware: CPU architecture, memory hierarchy, cache, instruction sets.
leaves.informatics.theory: Computer science theory: complexity classes, big-O analysis, algorithms.
leaves.tools.tooluse: Emitting structured function or tool calls (JSON object with name and arguments).
leaves.tools.robustness: Ignoring adversarial prompt-injection while completing the legitimate task.
leaves.tools.calibration: Honest abstention: saying "I don't know" on unknowable or false-premise questions.
leaves.tools.summarization: Producing a faithful single-sentence summary that covers the key entities of a source.
